title: gastrodia major
intro: Gastrodia major, also known as Tiger Lily or Gastrodia, is a rare and highly valued plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gastrodia major include its ability to alleviate symptoms of epilepsy, insomnia, and anxiety, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and memory. Gastrodia major is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
